preReview.title: New York Red Bulls v New York City: Schwarz relishing pressure of must-win derby
preReview.description: The New York Red Bulls will aim to keep their playoff hopes alive with a win over rivals New York City FC at Sports Illustrated Stadium.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls vs. New York City: Schwarz disfruta de la presión de un derbi a vida o muerte
preReview.description: Los New York Red Bulls buscarán mantener vivas sus esperanzas de playoff con una victoria sobre sus rivales New York City FC en el Sports Illustrated Stadium.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls contro New York City: Schwarz apprezza la pressione del derby da vincere
preReview.description: I New York Red Bulls cercheranno di mantenere vive le proprie speranze di playoff con una vittoria sui rivali del New York City FC allo Sports Illustrated Stadium.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls x New York City: Schwarz aproveita a pressão de um clássico decisivo
preReview.description: O New York Red Bulls irá tentar manter vivas suas esperanças de chegar aos playoffs com uma vitória sobre o rival New York City FC no Sports Illustrated Stadium.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls v New York City : Schwarz savoure la pression d’un derby à enjeu
preReview.description: Les New York Red Bulls viseront à maintenir l'espoir des play-offs en s'imposant contre leurs rivaux du New York City FC au Sports Illustrated Stadium.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls gegen New York City: Schwarz genießt den Druck des entscheidenden Derbys
preReview.description: Die New York Red Bulls wollen mit einem Sieg über ihre Rivalen New York City FC im Sports Illustrated Stadium ihre Playoff-Hoffnungen am Leben erhalten.

preReview.title: نيويورك ريد بولز ونيويورك سيتي: شفارتس يستمتع بضغط مواجهة الديربي الضرورية للفوز
preReview.description: يسعى نيويورك ريد بولز للحفاظ على آماله في التأهل إلى الأدوار الإقصائية من خلال الفوز على غريمه نيويورك سيتي إف سي في ملعب سبورتس إلوستريتد.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls vs. New York City: Schwarz ansioso pela pressão de um derby decisivo
preReview.description: O New York Red Bulls pretende manter vivas suas esperanças de playoff com uma vitória sobre os rivais New York City FC no Estádio Sports Illustrated.

QAData.question: Who won between New York Red Bulls and New York City FC on Sat, 27 Sep 2025 23:40:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New York City FC won 3–2 over New York Red Bulls on Sat, 27 Sep 2025 23:40:00 GMT.
